if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlanItem :: selectById */ i.* , pla.plan_nm AS plan_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pm_plan_item i LEFT JOIN pm_plan pla ON pla.plan_id = i.plan_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = i.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id WHERE i.plan_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlanItem :: selectList */ i.* , pla.plan_nm AS plan_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pm_plan_item i LEFT JOIN pm_plan pla ON pla.plan_id = i.plan_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = i.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlanItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , pla.plan_nm AS plan_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM pm_plan_item i LEFT JOIN pm_plan pla ON pla.plan_id = i.plan_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = i.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmPlanItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_plan_item i
